description: Named location defining the approved geographic region for all users. Referenced as an exclusion in CA-002 (Block Risky Locations). Any login attempt originating from outside these two countries triggers the block policy.

_metadata.rationale: Financial institution operating in Canada and the Americas — no legitimate login source outside these regions

test_1.result: Excluded from block — login proceeds to MFA challenge

test_2.result: Not excluded — CA-002 block policy applies, access denied
